Table of Contents

Interface IRasterStorageDef

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control raster storage properties.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("30B9828A-85A6-4228-A7A4-7AFB8A9842CC")]
public interface IRasterStorageDef

Properties

CellSize

The cell size of the raster to be stored.

IPnt CellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

IPnt

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressionQuality

The compression quality (in case of JPEG compression) to be applied to the raster being stored.

int CompressionQuality { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressionType

The compression type to be applied on the raster being stored.

esriRasterCompressionType CompressionType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterCompressionType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Origin

The origin of the raster to be stored.

IPoint Origin { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

PyramidLevel

The number of pyramid levels.

int PyramidLevel { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

PyramidResampleType

The method used for pyramid resampling.

rstResamplingTypes PyramidResampleType { get; set; }

Property Value

rstResamplingTypes

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileHeight

The raster storage tile height.

int TileHeight { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileWidth

The raster storage tile width.

int TileWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

int
